name: Comment
description: A comment posted on an issue in an issue tracking or project-management system.

id.description: Stable, provider-assigned identifier for the comment.

issue_id.description: Identifier of the parent issue the comment belongs to.

author.description: Identifier or email of the user who wrote the comment.

body.description: Body of the comment in Markdown or a provider-specific rich-text format.
body.example: Reproduced on staging. Patch attached, ready for review.

internal.description: Whether the comment is restricted to internal users and hidden from external reporters.

mentions.description: Users mentioned in the comment body.

updated_at.description: Timestamp the comment was last edited.

url.description: Web URL pointing directly to the comment.
